problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
hypothesis: Aerogel porosity for thermal/acoustic insulation may resolve What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
